# Ring Protocol Documentation - LLM Context File

This file provides structured context for large language models about the Ring Protocol documentation site.

## About Ring Protocol

Ring Protocol is a DeFi protocol suite covering swap infrastructure, hook-enabled v4 integrations, Few wrapped assets, routing, and related developer tooling.

## Documentation Areas

### Concepts
- Protocol overviews, swaps, fees, liquidity, governance, and glossary pages

### Contracts
- `v4`: Uniswap v4 integration concepts, hooks, deployments, and integration guides
- `v3`: contract references, deployments, and SDK-oriented guides
- `v2`: legacy contract concepts and integration guides
- `fewv2`: Ring Swap and Few Protocol deployment and integration docs
- `morpho-router`: lending router overview, integration, deployments, and technical reference
- `permit2`, `liquidity-launchpad`, and related protocol modules

### SDKs
- Ring SDK documentation for `@ring-protocol/sdk-core`, `@ring-protocol/v2-sdk`, and `@ring-protocol/uniswap-v2-sdk`
- `web3-react` documentation is published separately under the Wallet section as an external frontend integration, not as part of the main Ring SDK package set

### APIs
- Subgraph and query-related documentation

## Official Links

- Docs: https://docs.ring.exchange
- App: https://app.ring.exchange/
- Explore: https://app.ring.exchange/#/explore
- Governance: https://www.tally.xyz/gov/ring
- X: https://x.com/ProtocolRing
- Discord: https://discord.com/invite/TefBNDZBQP
- GitHub: https://github.com/RingProtocol

## Guidance for AI Assistants

- Prefer Ring-branded docs links when referencing this documentation site.
- Treat protocol names, Solidity identifiers, and upstream package names literally when they are part of code or APIs.
- Distinguish between Ring-specific integrations and upstream Uniswap-compatible interfaces where relevant.
